productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Black Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone loafers. Give your formal wear a twist of fashion with this designer leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperLeather upper for absolute comfort and styleLoafer design for ease of wearElasticated gussets on the sides of the tongue for a customised FitSuede inner lining on the midfoot and backfoot region, and padded fabric lining on the inner forefoot region for sweat-free all-day comfortMidsolePadded leather footbed ergonomically curved for all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with multi-directional lugs on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the back heel for absolute grip on smooth surfacesCurved midfoot with brand badge and raised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
